entries.title: Wydano aktualizację 1.4.1a do Half-Life: Alyx
entries.description: Ta aktualizacja zawiera kilka drobnych poprawek błędów odkrytych po większej aktualizacji 1.4.1 wydanej wcześniej w tym tygodniu. Poprawki gry Naprawiono błąd regresji powodujący, że hakowanie potykacza mogło doprowadzić do nieoczekiwanego zamknięcia. Od teraz menu dodatków w grze nie będzie pokazywało szablonów i niegrywalnych dodatków. Preferencje nowej gry nie są już resetowane przy powracaniu z gry do menu głównego. Wiele innych różnych poprawek nieoczekiwanych zamknięć. ID kompilacji: 51751

entries.title: Wydano aktualizację 1.4.1b do Half-Life: Alyx
entries.description: Poprawki gry Naprawiono niedawny problem zapobiegający tworzeniu lub aktualizowaniu nowych przedmiotów z warsztatu. ID kompilacji: 5292973

entries.title: Aktualizacja – komentarze
entries.description: Komentarz producenta zawiera spoilery. Zalecamy ukończenie gry przed włączeniem komentarza. Jak być może pamiętacie, gdy nasz zespół pracował nad ukończeniem Half-Life: Alyx , w stanie Waszyngton zostały wprowadzone obostrzenia związane z COVID-19.  Tak naprawdę znaczna część zespołu podjęła decyzję o pracy z domu jeszcze wcześniej.  Czas potrzebny na przyzwyczajenie się do nowego sposobu współpracy spowodował, że chociaż udało nam się wydać grę na czas, nie byliśmy w stanie ukończyć niektórych

entries.title: Half-Life: Alyx Update 1.5.1 released
entries.description: Game Fixes Fixed a case where developer commentary would appear to turn off when continuing from an autosave generated at the start of a map Correctly display commentary panel on primary hand in single-controller mode Corrected numbering of Commentary points of interest in Processing Plant map Content Build ID: 5844889

entries.title: Half-Life: Alyx Update 1.5.2 released
entries.description: Changes New honorary achievement for Gnome Chompski's upcoming journey into space on Rocket Lab's "Return To Sender" mission. Content Build ID: 5850798

entries.title: Wyprzedaż Black Friday w GMG - taniej GreedFall, Desperados 3 i inne gry
entries.description: Do 2 grudnia w sklepie Green Man Gaming trwa wyprzedaż z okazji Black Friday. Promocją objęto takie tytuły jak GreedFall, Desperados 3, Mutant Year Zero, Ace Combat 7, A Plague Tale oraz Assassin's Creed: Odyssey. entries.description: Znamy usprawnienia FIF-y 21 na PS5 oraz XSX/S i są one naprawdę obiecujące - uwzględniają chociażby technologie wykorzystywane przez kontroler DualSense. Zmian graficznych nie zauważą natomiast posiadacze pecetowej wersji gry. entries.description: Na początku przyszłego miesiąca na konsolach oraz komputerach PC zadebiutuje samodzielna wersja modułu zabawy wieloosobowej z Red Dead Redemption 2, która pozwoli bawić się w Internecie bez posiadania pełnej wersji tytułu. Do połowy lutego przyszłego roku Red Dead Online będzie sprzedawany w atrakcyjnej promocyjnej cenie. entries.title: Ruszyły zapisy do Świątecznej Bitwy Legend TFT
entries.description: W radiu już słychać pierwsze Last Christmas, a to oznacza tylko jedno - mamy zielone światło, aby startować ze Świąteczną Bitwą Legend! Ręka do góry, komu nie przyda się dodatkowa kasa na prezenty? Zapisy właśnie ruszyły, a do zgarnięcia są nagrody z puli 4 000 złotych! entries.title: Zestawienie ulubionych modów do Half-Life: Alyx
entries.description: Z racji tego, iż świętujemy pierwszą rocznicę premiery Half-Life: Alyx ( więcej informacji na ten temat znajdziecie tutaj ), pomyśleliśmy, że dobrze byłoby przyjrzeć się niektórym udanym modom stworzonym przez społeczność, które wnoszą do gry wiele życia. Poprosiliśmy Craiga Pearsona – dziennikarza, pisarza i miłośnika modów do Alyx – aby w nie zagrał i napisał kilka słów o tych, które najbardziej mu się spodobały. -- Nazywam się Craig Pearson. Pracowałem między innymi dla PC Gamera, IGN, Rock P

entries.title: Half-Life: Alyx rok później
entries.description: Minął już rok od premiery Half-Life: Alyx, naszego powrotu do serii Half-Life poprzez technologię VR. Krótko po debiucie gry włączyliśmy obsługę Warsztatu Steam , by otworzyć furtkę dla kreatywności twórców modów oraz by ułatwić graczom zwiększenie wrażeń płynących z Alyx. Później w 2020 roku wydaliśmy ponad 3,5-godzinny komentarz twórców , który wprowadził nowy sposób na zapoznanie się z Alyx – w trakcie gry można usłyszeć komentarz bezpośrednio od osób stojących za tym tytułem. Jesteśmy wdzięc

entries.title: Half-Life 2 - Update
entries.description: An update has been released for Half-Life 2, Episode One, Episode Two, and Lost Coast. - Updated localization strings and captions

entries.title: Half-Life: Alyx Update 1.5.3 released
entries.description: Updated the Workshop Tag list, based upon the community's suggestions. Changed the method used to transition from a1_intro_world to a1_intro_world_2. This fixes addons being broken across that transition. Content Build ID: 8644003

entries.title: Half-Life: Alyx Update 1.5.4 released
entries.description: Fixed transition from a1_intro_world_2 to a2_quarantine_entrance. Allowed Workshop Tag dialog to be resized. Content Build ID: 8694564

entries.title: Left 4 Dead 2 - Update
entries.description: An update has been released for Left 4 Dead 2: - Fixed a bug that prevented the community server list from appearing.

entries.title: Left 4 Dead 2 Free Weekend
entries.description: Left 4 Dead 2 celebrates its 15th anniversary this weekend by going free-to-play until November 18th. Jump in for the first time to battle zombie hordes with your friends, or come back for the opportunity to finally earn the "Good Guy Nick" achievement!

entries.title: Aktualizacja z okazji 20. rocznicy Half-Life 2
entries.description: Half-Life 2 oficjalnie skończyło 20 lat i chcemy wykorzystać tę okazję, by uczcić społeczność graczy, którzy cieszą się tą grą (lub dopiero ją odkrywają albo nawet odkrywają na nowo) od 16 listopada 2004 roku. Kompletne Half-Life 2 Stworzyliśmy nową stronę służącą szczegółowemu zaprezentowaniu wszystkich aktualizacji , ale tutaj macie szybki przegląd nowości: Episode One i Two są teraz dołączone do gry. Half-Life 2 obejmuje teraz pełne rozszerzenia Episode One i Episode Two wraz z bazową grą. Są

entries.title: November 16, 2024 Update
entries.description: Fixed a crash that could occur in some languages when starting a new chapter. UI - Fixed some weapon icon alignment issues at various resolutions. Workshop - Fixed campaigns set to expand on Episode One loading some Episode Two content. Workshop - Always show the My Uploads page, even if not in developer mode. Workshop - Various UI adjustments and improvements.

entries.title: November 18, 2024 Update
entries.description: Fixed issue where NPC reactions to the player's flashlight and some incidental dialogue would not play after switching between episodes. Fixed amount of bloom applied after switching between Episode One and Episode Two. Fixed the FOV setting not applying until you got the HEV Suit if you started a new game and watched the intro sequence. Fixed issue where HUD messages for pickups and responses to some console commands would display multiple times after switching between episodes. Fixed scaling f

entries.title: November 26, 2024 Update
entries.description: Enable support to keep music playing during level transitions throughout the base Half-Life 2 campaign (no convar needed). Added support for displaying an active Workshop campaign name in your Steam friends list. Added a slider to the settings menu to allow scaling stick sensitivity for gamepads. Fixed issue with overlapping commentary tracks if a commentary track was playing between level loads. Fixed issue where gamepad buttons may be permanently stuck pressed after saving the game. entries.title: REDstreams — Aktualizacja 2.2 nadchodzi!
entries.description: 📢 Uwaga, uwaga, 📢 Już jutro zapraszamy na najnowszy odcinek #REDstreams, w którym omówimy szczegóły nadchodzącej Aktualizacji 2.2 do Cyberpunka 2077! Widzimy się o 17:00 na naszym Twitchu oraz, po raz pierwszy, jednocześnie na naszym kanale YouTube. https://www.twitch.tv/cdprojektred https://www.youtube.com/@CyberpunkGame Dołączcie koniecznie, bo będzie 🔥

entries.title: Aktualizacja 2.2 jest już dostępna!
entries.description: Teraz będziecie mogli się wyrazić jak nigdy wcześniej. Aktualizacja 2.2 wprowadza ponad 100 nowych opcji personalizacji V, kompatybilność funkcji CrystalCoat™ dla dodatkowych marek pojazdów, zupełnie nową funkcję TWINTONE™ dla pojazdów obsługujących CrystalCoat™ i jeszcze więcej! Tryb foto również otrzymał ulepszenia — nowe opcje kamery i proporcji screenów, możliwość dodania źródeł światła i NPC-ów gotowych zapozować do zdjęcia, a wymieniać można by dalej! Poniżej znajdziecie informacje o wszys

entries.title: Spróbuj swoich sił w Wyzwaniu Trybu Foto 3.0
entries.description: Strzelać czy nie strzelać — mało kto zadaje sobie to pytanie w Night City. Na szczęście tym razem mowa o zdjęciach. Na każdym rogu czeka warta uchwycenia historia i nadeszła Twoja kolej, by wziąć byka za rogi! Wciel się w ulicznego reportera “Night City Today” i zmierz się z Wyzwaniem Trybu Foto! Chcemy zobaczyć Night City Twoimi oczami. Jesteś na tropie dwóch historii i tylko od Ciebie zależy, której się podejmiesz. A może obu? Twoją bronią jest oko do szczegółów i Kiroshi. W grę wchodzą: Fury

entries.title: Aktualizacja 2.21
entries.description: Dodaje ona obsługę DLSS 4 na PC oraz wprowadza różne poprawki, w szczególności do trybu foto. Pełna lista zmian znajduje się poniżej: Tryb foto Nibbles i Adam Smasher mogą się teraz pojawiać, gdy V jest w powietrzu lub w wodzie. Poprawiono opcję mimiki dla Adama Smashera. Naprawiono błąd, który powodował, że brakowało świecącego wszczepu klatki piersiowej Adama Smashera. Naprawiono błąd, który sprawiał, że jeśli alternatywny wygląd Johnny'ego był włączony, obie opcje jego pojawienia się (domyśln

entries.title: The Final Patch: New Subclasses, Photo Mode, and Cross-Play
entries.description: Patch 8 is now live! For the full patch notes, please click here . Well folks, This is it. Our final major game patch for Baldur’s Gate 3. You’ve helped us make BG3 a bigger success than any of us could’ve ever hoped for, and that passion could keep us tweaking things and making changes until the end of time. But then we’d never be able to create something new. Outside of minor bug fixing, Patch 8 will be the last game patch to introduce new content. That means we won’t be adding any new narrati

entries.title: Hotfix #30 Now Live!
entries.description: Hey everyone, A small hotfix is now rolling out, bringing multiple cross-play fixes and patching up some instances of crashing. Certain betentacled individuals will now be more amenable to having their picture taken – give us a smile, petal! While Patch 8 was the last major patch for Baldur’s Gate 3, we will continue to release small hotfixes addressing bugs in the game. If you have come across any issues, please make sure to report them to our Support Team . Missed out on what’s new on Patch 8?

entries.title: Hotfix #31 Now Live!
entries.description: Hey everyone, Been tripping hard? It’s not you, it’s us. (Probably.). Today’s hotfix aims to tackle the kaleidoscope of colours that appear when changing locations, as well as various other bugs that have made their way into the game. We’re still fixing a few things, and will continue to release small hotfixes addressing bugs in the game. Please report any issues with our Support Team . Missed out on what’s new on Patch 8? Read all about it here , and tune into today’s stream as our Dark Urge ru

entries.title: Community Update #34 - Connecting With Cross-Play & Hotfix #32
entries.description: As we celebrate the final major patch for Baldur’s Gate 3, we have nothing but gratitude for all the support you've shown along the way. While this marks the end of one chapter, it's also the beginning of an exciting new journey ahead - and we can't wait to share more with you soon. In the meantime, we’re here to help you get comfy with Patch 8, from enabling cross-play with friends across platforms to choosing the perfect new subclass for your next adventure. To help make your travels around th

entries.title: Aktualizacja 2.3 — lista zmian
entries.description: Aktualizacja 2.3 będzie dostępna już jutro! Poznaj Night City od całkiem nowej strony – ta aktualizacja wprowadza 4 nowe pojazdy, funkcję AutoDrive, autonomiczne taksówki Delamain i nie tylko! Zawiera też między innymi poprawki CrystalCoat™ oraz trybu foto, jak również obsługę AMD FSR 3.1 Frame Generation i Intel XeSS 2.0 i HDR10+ Gaming. Aktualizacja 2.3 wprowadza też Cyberpunka 2077 na całkiem nową platformę: urządzenia Mac z układem scalonym Apple! Jeśli już posiadasz grę na Steamie, możesz w

entries.title: July 23, 2025 Update
entries.description: Restored speed of the train near the end of Highway 17 to better match the original shipped difficulty. Fixed missing collision that was allowing NPCs to shoot through some walls in Entanglement. Fixed issue where Alyx could obstruct the player's path when boarding the teleporter near the end of Entanglement. NOTE: these map updates will not break existing saves but players may need to restart their current chapter if they saved after a progress blocking bug on a previous game version.

entries.title: Room Temperature Fix #33 Now Live!
entries.description: Hello friends, how art thou? While Patch 8 may have been the last major game update as we head into development on our next game, we’re still very keen to ensure you can enjoy the best possible Baldur’s Gate 3 experience Which means we’re still fixing things, and although more cold than hot, today’s hotfix introduces fixes for some game crashes that had been plaguing us, and finally tackles the slightly ominous character portraits and lag being experienced when navigating the radial menu with a

entries.title: Community Update #35 Baldur's Gate 3 Turns Two
entries.description: Happy birthday, gang! Baldur's Gate 3 turns two - hard to believe, isn't it? It feels like only yesterday we were streaming our launch-day Panel From Hell from a cathedral in Ghent and earning a TikTok ban in the process for our druidic love crimes. But time flies. Two years later, Baldur’s Gate 3 has grown into something far beyond what we could have ever imagined back then - it’s become a shared universe shaped just as much by your imaginations as ours. You've embraced the characters, rewritte

entries.title: It’s All About You! — Edgerunners duos: To the Moon Together
entries.description: Surviving the City of Dreams is tough, but a choom at your side can make all the difference. In our latest It’s All About You episode, we’re celebrating all of our iconic duos living on the edge! Night City wouldn’t shine quite so bright without them. Thank you for staying with us and expressing your love for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners in the most creative ways possible. Don't forget to check out our gallery to see more works, and, of course, share your creations with us: http://cdpred.ly/AAY . See

entries.description: Aktualizacja 2.31 dla Cyberpunka 2077 jest już dostępna! Aktualizacja obejmuje ulepszenie funkcji AutoDrive oraz poprawki w trybie foto. Adresuje także najczęściej napotykane przez graczy problemy. Szczegółową listę zmian znajdziesz poniżej: Pojazdy Zaktualizowano funkcję AutoDrive. Teraz podczas jazdy do wybranego punktu pojazd porusza się płynnie, wyprzedza blokujące go pojazdy i nie zatrzymuje się na światłach. Tryb swobodnej jazdy również został ulepszony – pojazd przestrzega przepisów ruchu

entries.title: Hotfix #34 Now Live!
entries.description: Update 02/10/2025: We've rolled out a fix which aims to resolve issues with freezing on PS5 when accessing party management. As this fix involves tweaks to controller input, it will need to be deployed on all platforms and it has now been deployed on PC. Cross-play remains unaffected. For those of you who have been running into issues with the Performance Overlay, Steam Deck have now released a Beta update that aims to restore this. You can read Steam's update here: https://store.steampowered.co

entries.title: Square Enix Black Friday Sale 2025
entries.description: Sweater weather is here! Find great deals on fall favorites like DRAGON QUEST III HD-2D Remake, FINAL FANTASY VII REMAKE INTERGRADE, Life is Strange: True Colors, PowerWash Simulator, and more!

entries.title: Hotfix #35 Now Live!
entries.description: Hello folks, We’re dropping by to serve up a small hotfix today! Focusing mainly on improving performance, this update should resolve some crashes on consoles and address certain issues on the Steam Deck. We’ve also gone ahead and bumped the default Upscaling Type from FSR 1 to FSR 2.2 on Steam Deck Native, which should result in sharper visuals overall. We hope you’re all staying warm during sweater weather (or cool during sensible thin cardigan weather in the southern hemisphere). Check out th

entries.title: Community Update #36 A Very Moddy Christmas
entries.description: Hello friends, The days are getting colder, the holiday decorations are creeping out early, and honestly? We’re leaning into it. It’s been a long year, one that saw Baldur’s Gate 3 receive twelve new subclasses, full cross-play support, and the arrival of photo mode - the last final, final last patch. It’s been an exciting year for us, what with also launching Larian: Channel From Hell, with weekly streams where you’ve had sneak peeks into our madness, met valued members of the team, and pushed

entries.title: Zwiastun z okazji 5.rocznicy — "Miasto Legend"
entries.description: Świętuj razem z nami 5. rocznicę premiery Cyberpunka 2077! Z tej okazji przygotowaliśmy specjalny zwiastun, który przypomina niezapomnianą przygodę V w Mieście Legend. Dziękujemy, że jesteście z nami i towarzyszycie nam w wyprawie do świata mrocznej przyszłości. Bez Was Night City nie byłoby takie samo. 💛

entries.title: Najważniejsi jesteście Wy! — Never Fade Away
entries.description: Nie śpimy, samuraju! Świętujemy dalej 5. rocznicę Cyberpunka 2077 specjalnym, jubileuszowym odcinkiem "Najważniejsi jesteście Wy!", w którym wspomnieniami wracamy do niezapomnianych historii Night City! Jasne, to miasto nigdy do cichych nie należało — syreny, syntezatory, strzały w oddali... Ale jeśli jest jedna nuta, która nieprzerwanie rozbrzmiewa w jego duszy i przebija się przez ten cały hałas, to jest to „Never Fade Away”. Więc przeczesaliśmy ulice miasta snów i znaleźliśmy muzycznych bunto

entries.title: Gothic 1 Remake | OST | The Swamp's Breath
entries.description: The Swamp Camp is a place of power, faith, and devotion to the Sleeper. It possesses a unique, almost mystical atmosphere and energy. For the composer of the Gothic 1 Remake soundtrack, Kai Rosenkranz , it was essential to enhance the Brotherhood’s refreshed visual style with a richer, more immersive sound. The goal was to create perfect harmony between the camp’s striking new visuals and its audio landscape — while faithfully preserving the original’s distinctive, atmospheric character. Listen

entries.title: Iceland: Fjords
entries.description: We are happy to bring you another preview from the upcoming Iceland map expansion for Euro Truck Simulator 2 , as today, we are taking a closer look at the majestic fjords found in this country! These glacier-carved inlets are an integral part of the Land of Fire and Ice landscape. They can be found in various locations around the island and are filled with wildlife, towering cliffs, and centuries-old fishing villages. Capturing Iceland's stunning fjords on our scale presented a unique challenge

In this update, we will be introducing the Improved Material System for the interior of selected trucks! Let's take a look. The Improved Material System, which will be introduced in the 1.60 update for both games, significantly improves the lighting and visual quality of vehicle interiors

entries.title: High-Tech and High Power Return to Horizon Mexico!
entries.description: If you are looking for an everyday vehicle you can drive peacefully, this isn’t the week for you, I’m afraid, because the 20 PTS reward for the second week of Modern Horizons is no other than the 2023 Hyundai iONIQ 5 N. The 5 N has a lot to offer to different types of drivers. Its 641 bhp electric engine can let it reach a 0-100 kmh speed of 3.4 seconds, and its four-wheel drive will let you drift like there’s no tomorrow. We just love how a little badge with the letter N means a car will transf

entries.title: Zarabiaj na czysto dzięki premiom Money Fronts
entries.description: Wprawiaj turystów oraz lokalsów w zachwyt, pokazując im południowe San Andreas z lotu ptaka i wznieś pranie pieniędzy na nowe wyżyny dzięki działalności w ramach Lotów widokowych Higgins, które są dostępne do 3 czerwca za darmo w Maze Bank Foreclosures dla wszystkich posiadaczy myjni Hands On. Działaj też prężnie na innych frontach, zgarniając w tym tygodniu 4x więcej GTA$ i RP za wszystkie misje prania pieniędzy, podwójny przychód z pralni w myjni Hands On i nie tylko. entries.title: The GR Yaris Returns for You to Unlock and Modify!

entries.title: Voices of the Valley of Mines
entries.description: With Gothic 1 Remake about to release, we thought it was the perfect time to introduce you to the voices that bring the Colony to life. Take a look at the voice casts for the English, German, Polish, and Russian localizations! Whenever possible, we worked with original voice actors to preserve the authentic spirit of Gothic. At the same time, we welcomed talented performers who share a passion for the project and could help recreate the atmosphere that made the original game so memorable.

entries.title: Gothic 1 Remake is Out Now! Welcome to the Colony!
entries.description: Gothic 1 Remake is Out Now! Welcome to the Colony! Barcelona, Spain / Vienna, Austria - June 5th, 2026: Gothic 1 Remake is available now on PC, PlayStation®5 and Xbox Series X|S, bringing one of the most beloved cult RPGs of the early 2000s back to life. Gothic 1 Remake has been fully rebuilt in Unreal Engine 5 while staying faithful to the atmosphere, story, and brutal charm of the original classic. entries.title: Time to get a little sadder about Destiny 2: TWIDs are coming to an end
entries.description: Destiny 2 is ending—for all intents and purposes, in fact, it already has, with the launch earlier this week of its final update, Monument of Triumph . More than one Destiny fan at PC Gamer has described the moment as bittersweet—it's not only Destiny 2's last live service update, it's also one of its best —and in a smaller way, this is too: Maybe it's no surprise, but the clockwork-like This Week in Destiny updates will soon be over... Read more.

entries.title: Why do mech games rarely let you leave the cockpit? Brigador Killers devs joke that the feature 'added five years of development time'
entries.description: I love a mech game, but I especially love when a mech game lets you get out of the cockpit and just run around. It makes things feel so much less gamey , and it more fully sells the scale and power of a mech to contrast it with the perspective of a puny little human. Few games ever do it, though... Read more.

entries.title: Even a fantasy game like Skyrim won't let me be a trillionaire
entries.description: The news that Elon Musk has become the world's first trillionaire, which seems like something the world definitely doesn't need, got me thinking: have I ever even played a videogame that let me be a trillionaire? I've definitely racked up millions of dollars or coins or other make-believe currency in a few games… but trillions?.. Read more.

The launch version looks like it'll introduce a lot of new stuff to Pocketpair's Pokémon-inspired survival-crafting game, and with all those additions comes a question: will Palworld 1.0 require players to start again from scratch, or will you be able to carry on your adventure as normal?.. entries.description: The Witcher 3 isn't exactly short of stuff to do, but I nonetheless lament that one of its most ambitious questlines never made it into the final game. Not only because it would have delved much more deeply into The Catriona Plague—a disease ravaging Velen that mostly serves as a background event in the final game—but also because it would have brought back The Witcher 2 's best character, the elven rebel smokeshow Iorveth... Read more.

entries.title: It's bittersweet that the best time to play Destiny 2 in years coincides with its end, but I'm happy for the new players who get to experience its most liberating iteration yet
entries.description: When Bungie announced the final update for Destiny 2 , I felt relieved. It surprised me as well. As someone who's spent the past six years (and over 3,000 hours) battling humanity's enemies across the solar system, you'd think that news of my favorite MMO's end would fill me with sadness. But no, just a bittersweet sense of relief as I considered we were finally moving on (as we should've after The Final Shape's year) to whatever the future may hold... Read more.

entries.title: Destiny 2 comes full circle as players honour the tradition of pushing bosses to their deaths—this time by becoming a porcupine and smacking them with a void football
entries.description: Destiny 2 's sun is setting , and it's perhaps fitting that one of the oldest traditions of the franchise—that is, pushing bosses to their doom—is happening once again. Except this time, they're becoming porcupines holding void light footballs which smacks bosses so hard they fall to their deaths... Read more.

entries.title: MiG-21 Discounts for the Anniversary of the MiG-21’s First Flight!
entries.description: On June 15th 1955, the MiG-21, one of the most recognizable and mass-produced supersonic fighters in history, took to the skies for the first time. Nearly 11,500 of these aircraft were made. Relatively inexpensive to produce, it was also fast, survivable, and durable, ensuring its popularity worldwide and participation in numerous conflicts. The Chinese J-7 fighter family traces its lineage to the MiG-21. 30% Discount on MiG-21 variants! When: From June 16th (11:00 GMT) until June 19th (11:00 GM

entries.title: I've been waiting 20 years for a worthy sequel to my favourite life sim, but THQ Nordic has other ideas
entries.description: I usually expect blank stares when I wax nostalgic about The Guild 2, a rough diamond that's part management game, part life sim, part RPG. It's the kind of game that does well in central Europe but not remotely as well elsewhere. Your classic eurojank romp: big on ambition, not so much on optimisation or clarity. This is the Stalker of life sims... Read more.

entries.title: An obscure new game-breaking Destiny bug lets you one-hit bosses, and I don't think Bungie's gonna let this one slide
entries.description: Destiny 2's live service ambitions have come to an end with its final update last week. And with it, Bungie added everything and the kitchen sink, from new catalysts for every Exotic weapon to broken perk combinations. With no new endgame to grind or necessarily protect the sanctity of balance, Bungie's set us free with some of the most broken—and fun—tools we've ever had... Read more.

entries.title: Anima Strike Meta Event
entries.description: Anima Strike Meta Event Anima Strike is a three-week event that unfolds as you fight your way through the new Tokyo map, where Shion reigns supreme. Conquer daily and weekly challenges to move across the city, discovering Hashimoto, Yokai, and Subway locations, all littered with lore. The deeper you push into Tokyo, the more you uncover, including choices to make on branching paths and fresh rewards to stack each week. Anima Strike is a narrative driven by momentum, told at your pace, your way.

entries.title: Less than a month before launch, survival RPG Outward 2 delayed into 2027
entries.description: Survival RPG Outward 2 has been delayed from a July 2026 release into next year. Developer Nine Dots Studio delivered the news on Steam today, with Nine Dots CEO and Outward 2 creative director Guillaume Boucher-Vidal saying "I apologize that we couldn’t give you the game you guys deserve on time.".. entries.title: Bungie will let Destiny 2 'near infinite damage' bug ride for a week: 'Do your thing'
entries.description: Destiny 2's final content update threw so much into the shooter that something was bound to break, and break it did. An upcoming patch will fix a "near infinite damage" bug introduced by the Monument of Triumph update, but the developers at Bungie have decided to drag their feet on the fix to let more players have a taste of godlike power... entries.title: Account Transfer
entries.description: Captains! The account transfer testing period has come to an end. Thank you to everyone who helped us test the system and shared their feedback. The account transfer feature is now available to all players. To use it, open: My Profile → Account Transfer Then carefully read the pop-up window that appears and review the list of resources that will be transferred. If you encounter any issues or have questions during the transfer process, please contact Support. Fair winds and following seas!

The main issues we wanted to address were the country selection screen being broken in several mods, as well as an exploit regarding ‘Force Attack’. Both of these issues are fixed now alongside a bunch of other bug fixes and balance changes. Besides letting us know what to focu

entries.title: It just keeps getting worse—Microsoft reportedly already had Ninja Theory in its crosshairs while pushing the announcement trailer for its next game
entries.description: Perhaps the most shocking part of Microsoft's incoming rash of suspected layoffs and studio closures is Ninja Theory—a studio which had announced a Senua game at the Xbox showcase barely a week prior. At the time it seemed either a misalignment of strategy, the result of someone high-up not crossing their Ts or dotting their Is... Read more.

entries.title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales review
entries.description: I always thought history was boring as a kid. Nuts to the past, I want cool tech, body mods, and lightspeed travel! But maybe I would have felt differently if I had a game like The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales back then. What better way is there to appreciate the past than violently cutting down a million monsters in a ye olde fantasy Philadelphia?.. Read more.

entries.title: Bryce Clark, game director of Poppy Playtime, has played 23,000 hours of Steam games: 'I'm a bit obsessed with learning the market'
entries.description: Bryce Clark, game director on Poppy Playtime, grew up playing DOS games on his family PC. His favourite childhood game was the 1994 fantasy RTS Dominus , which had unfortunate ramifications for his father. "It was nearly impossible to get working," Clark recalls. "My poor dad ended up spending so many hours on the hard line trying to call tech support. 'Why is this videogame not working for my son?' It was a lot about troubleshooting way back.".. Read more.

entries.title: The arcade meets the hex grid in R-Type Tactics—an unlikely fusion that shines like a star on PC
entries.description: Every long-running series benefits from an occasional change of genre. Yakuza dabbling in RPG-style combat works well. Dragon Quest going Dynasty Warriors for a bit is nothing but refreshing. Sonic racing about in a car makes a fun change of pace. Now it's R-Type's turn, the legendary arcade shmup series putting on a strategy hat and stuffing its UI with statistics and material costs... Read more.

entries.title: Path of Exile 2 Wallpapers
entries.description: Path of Exile 2 loading screens feature artwork created by the talented artists on our team. We've gathered a collection of high-resolution loading screen artwork from Acts One through Four, along with the art for each Ascendancy Class and artwork from other content, that you can use as desktop wallpapers. We've put together versions of these wallpapers in 1920x1080, 2560x1040, and 3840x2160, all of which you can download here .

entries.title: I usually skip soulslikes not made by FromSoftware, but one Steam demo just won me over
entries.description: I'm a FromSoft fiend, but there are hardly any other soulslikes I can stand. I can dig something a bit more removed like the first-person Lunacid or 2D Mina the Hollower , but there's an uncanny valley effect for me with stuff like Lies of P or Nioh: It's so close to being the thing I love, but doesn't quite bring it home... Read more.

entries.title: Solo-Queue Test Scheduled for June 30th

entries.title: Mission Update - Wed June 24
entries.description: Hi everyone Good news. We are holding the line on DDOS. Thank you for your patience. The awkward news: VOYAGE right now is experiencing a memory crash. The match making feature that allowed VOYAGE servers to wind down isn't working properly, so they live longer than they should and eventually crash due to memory. It results in a network issue disconnect message, and then gets you stuck on a reconnecting screen because it's trying to connect to a dead server. Please avoid VOYAGE until we deploy a

entries.title: 'Don't blame yourselves' for Destiny 2's end, community lead tells players: 'No words can accurately depict how lucky we are to have shared these worlds with you'
entries.description: Destiny 2 Destiny 2 has reached the end of the line: The final update is live, TWIDs are over , and we're all left wondering how the one-time king of live service shooters has come to such ignominious ruin. Even Destiny's competitors are baffled by Sony's decision to pull the plug, although some say Sony's not the real villain here at all. If there is a villain, besides Bungie management—which I think we can all agree has been pretty consistently not great —one thing's for sure: It's not Destiny

entries.title: John Carmack apologizes after Sandy Petersen says 'Quake ruined id Software,' and for once John Romero doesn't tell Sandy he's wrong
entries.description: The 30 th anniversary of Quake recently passed by—June 22, 2026 was the day—and of course there were acknowledgements, salutes, and celebrations a-plenty, as you'd expect for such a groundbreaking, influential, and enduring game. But it also got a couple of the driving forces behind it reflecting on those days rather more deeply, and as sometimes happens when youthful memories come to the surface, they got pretty deep into their feelings ... Read more.

entries.title: You can finally turn Riot's Vanguard anti-cheat off when you're not playing a game
entries.description: Riot Games is making a big change to its Vanguard anti-cheat system: After an update set to go live today (and which may already be live by the time you read this) it will not launch when your PC boots up, but will instead will be "on demand," meaning it will only run when playing a game and will shut down once the gameplay is over... Read more.

entries.title: I've played countless Doom engine games, so believe me when I say this one that combines the FPS with JRPG combat might be the coolest one in 30 years
entries.description: I know my Doom , and its many derivatives . I've been covering it for years . It has almost never left my PC in over three decades, so I do not say this lightly. End of Starchild —a completely free, standalone game from prolific musician and indie dev Em Essex—might be the single coolest thing built on Doom's venerable, time-tested foundations... Read more.

entries.title: G-Fusion Game Festival 2026 Shenzhen
entries.description: About G-Fusion: G-Fusion Game Festival is one of the biggest gamer-oriented video game events in China. It is run by the Chinese video game media - GCORES. G-Fusion began as a gamer meet up event and gradually grew into a large-scale, professional video game festival. But no matter how big it has become, G-Fusion still keeps its focus on the gamers' experiences. Audiences will be able to enjoy all kinds of games ranging from indie titles, AAA titles to even tabletop games from all over the world

entries.title: A Decal Trophy for British Armed Forces Day!
entries.description: The first Victoria Cross ceremony took place on June 26th 1857. In 2009, the last Saturday in June was designated British Armed Forces Day. The British Army distinguished itself most prominently during the Second World War, when following the surrender of France, Britain and the Commonwealth remained Germany’s only adversaries for a full year. After the Second World War, Britain primarily fought as part of coalition forces, but the Falklands War vividly demonstrated its military effectiveness. O

entries.description: A new in-game survey is available for players, focused on the Hideout and its role in character progression. We would like to hear your opinion on module upgrades, construction times, usefulness, and possible new features for the Hideout. Your responses will help us improve existing mechanics and determine priorities for future changes. As a reward for participating in the survey, you will receive an item via in-game mail.

entries.title: Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer says the NCR and Caesar's Legion feel so real because their members disagree and challenge each other: 'You have to wrestle with the fact that it contains multitudes'
entries.description: Fallout: New Vegas is an incredible game, and its factions are its best part. The New California Republic (NCR), Caesar's Legion, and the Securitrons of Mr House are omnipresent in the Mojave, and there's barely an NPC in the game that doesn't shine light on some new aspect of each one... Read more.

entries.title: Star Wars: Galactic Racer has a lot more Slay the Spire DNA than I expected, because its ex-Burnout devs wanted to add 'real consequence' to each race
entries.description: Don't call Galactic Racer "Podracer" in front of its developers—they'll politely point out that their new game is about multiple types of racing in the Star Wars universe, and it is not a sequel to 1999's Episode 1 Racer, despite featuring podracing's most iconic characters and courses. At first this feels like splitting hairs to mollify the strict branding watchdogs of the Walt Disney Corporation, but play a few minutes of the new racer and the distinction starts to make more sense... Read more

While we couldn't answer every question - particularly those looking to uncover future content or venturing outside the realm of history - we tackled as many as we could! entries.title: Not content with a Nightdive remaster, Thief's also getting a graphic novel and an original soundtrack featuring Garrett's voice actor
entries.description: In one of the rarest phrases ever uttered, it's a pretty good time to be a Thief fan right now. Earlier this month, Thief: The Dark Project Remastered was announced at The PC Gaming Show , with the remaster maestros at Nightdive Studios lending their skills to Looking Glass' revolutionary stealth game. Last month also brought a new stealth game from many of Thief's original creators, with Thick as Thieves proving a surprisingly fun sneaking romp—even if it feels significantly cut down from its o

entries.title: Web port wizards produce browser versions of Half-Life 2 and Portal
entries.description: It's been established that Doom can run on produce , but porting wizardry doesn't start and end with blasting cacodemons on increasingly ludicrous hardware setups. It's sometimes the simple things that stick out most, like this web browser port of Half-Life 2 . Not as silly as potatoes, but impressive all the same... Read more.

entries.title: Riot delays 'last hit indicators' in League of Legends ranked mode after fan response: 'We want to get more data and feedback'
entries.description: Once you've lost a few thousand hours to a MOBA, it's easy to forget how hard it was to learn. A game like League of Legends has well over a hundred playable characters, all sorts of items and jungle monsters, and even the basics can be fussy. One of the most crucial is the zen practice of "last hitting," or swinging at a hostile creep right as it's about to die to get credit and gold for the kill... Read more.

entries.title: Palworld 1.0 update has '27 pdf pages of changes and additions,' says publishing lead
entries.description: Palworld just keeps moving. It's postured to more or less shrug off its prominent legal battle with Nintendo , and it's reaching that glorious threshold any survival-craft game hopes to eventually cross: actually being done. Or if not done, complete enough to call it version 1.0 when it finally releases July 10... Read more.

entries.title: To get Thief Remastered's cutscenes right, Nightdive brought on the dev behind the 1998 originals
entries.description: In a new episode of Nightdive's Deep Dive podcast , host Locke Vincent, producer Daniel Grayshon, and studio head Stephen Kick got into some of the more granular details of Thief: The Dark Project Remastered, including that they brought on an original Looking Glass artist, Daniel Thron, to help revamp Thief's cutscenes... Read more.

entries.title: Nightdive says compatibility with fan missions was a big priority for Thief Remastered, and there's one massive mod in particular it knew it had to get working
entries.description: Thief: The Dark Project is a brilliant game for many reasons, among which is that it has one of the best mapping communities of any game. While the Doom and Quake mapping scenes are larger and more prolific, Thief's mappers consistently punch so far above their weight they should probably get into boxing sims rather than stealth games. They regularly deliver maps, missions and entire campaigns that are orders of magnitude more ambitious than what exists in the base game... Read more.

entries.title: Josh Sawyer says the Fallout TV show is an 'amazing adaptation' of a videogame, and 'one of the best that I've seen'
entries.description: There's one thing all videogame adaptations in film and TV have in common: they stink. Or at least, that's how it felt for a long time—personally, I stopped adding the caveat 'good for a videogame adaptation' after I watched the Fallout show and learned these things didn't have to be somewhere between middling and godawful. But what do Fallout's designers and developers think of the show?.. Read more.

entries.title: Fallout: New Vegas director Josh Sawyer says Obsidian has 'Karma Police' who go through games making sure every skill gets enough cool stuff to do: 'We're not gonna leave you out to dry'
entries.description: In a recent appearance on the Human Can Opener podcast , Obsidian design director Josh Sawyer talked about how the studio approached balance in Fallout: New Vegas, particularly with skill checks in dialogue and making sure different character builds got unique, cool reactivity throughout the game... Read more.

entries.title: After a 4-year wait, Netflix announces Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is coming this fall

entries.title: The original version of Dead or Alive 6 was delisted in favor of a rerelease that's currently at 70% negative reviews on Steam: 'Tecmo just sees this as the coomer franchise'
entries.description: Back when the GTA Trilogy trainwreck happened, Dominic Tarason wrote a piece for us making the case that old games shouldn't be delisted when they're rereleased . It hasn't stopped happening, of course, and most recently Dead or Alive 6 was removed from sale in favor of Dead or Alive 6 Last Round, a rerelease so underwhelming it's currently got a 70% negative user rating on Steam. For comparison, the original version is currently 70% positive, and that's after players started giving it negative

entries.title: Sony games boss says company will bravely keep sending live services over the top, despite cancelling 8 of the 12 ones planned for 2025 and wiping out most of Destiny 2's developers
entries.description: Sony had a rough track record last year. As one of our contributors Rick Lane pointed out, the company had cancelled eight out of 12 live service games that were originally planned for 2025, including the trainwreck that was Concord —fast-forward to 2026, and it's called curtains on Destiny 2 , a game just years prior I would've considered one of the most successful live service games on the market... Read more.

entries.title: I wasn't convinced Cyberpunk: Edgerunners could have a sadder ending until I read its writer's other pitches—and boy did we get off easy
entries.description: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners is an excellent anime, and it's also very sad—its ending does a great job of reaching into your chest, busting past your ribs, grabbing your heart and ripping it out. It's a genuinely thoughtful examination of the cyberpunk genre's dystopia, the corrupt ideas of success and legacy we can get in a society that views people as disposable... Read more.

entries.title: Baldur's Gate 2's co-lead designer was asked to make Baldur's Gate 4 after Larian declined: 'Having to compete against Baldur's Gate 3? That would be insanity'
entries.description: fter the stratospheric success of Baldur's Gate 3 , Hasbro was naturally keen for a follow-up. The only problem? Larian wasn't interested in doing Baldur's Gate 4. And it turns out the second person Hasbro asked didn't want the job either... Read more.

entries.title: We finally got our first good look at Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2, and I hate to break it to you but I don't think this one's gonna have a happy ending either
entries.description: day after revealing that Cyberpunk: Edgerunners 2 is finally coming this fall , Netflix has dropped the first real trailer for the anime's second season. It has all the gnarly neon action I was hoping for, plus enough shocked-looking, crying, or mid-cyberpsychosis main characters to have me thinking we're in for another bummer of an ending⁠ —but at least we'll have fun along the way... Read more.

entries.title: Before his death in 2025, Half-Life 2 art director Viktor Antonov worked on one last game: A Wild West FPS roguelike that's 'coming soon' to Steam
entries.description: Visionary artist Viktor Antonov defined a small but unforgettable selection of games with his unmistakably bold visual style, including Half-Life 2, Dishonored, Wolfenstein: The New Order, and Weird West. (He also did Redneck Rampage, but that was way back when.) He died in 2025 at just 52 years old, but before his tragic passing he put his stamp on one final game, revealed today as a fantasy Wild West soulslike shooter called Guns of Eschaton... Read more.

The Semifinals weren't any easier, where the Falcons met Team Spirit in a best of three that saw two maps go to Overtime. entries.title: A Decal Trophy and Discounts for Japan Self-Defense Forces Day!
entries.description: The Japan Self-Defense Forces were established on July 1st 1954. Initially, they held only a defensive mandate, but over time they began participating in international missions (typically UN peacekeeping operations) and providing assistance to their allies. The Self-Defense Forces are also deployed to assist during major natural disasters, such as the earthquakes of 1995 and 2011. The IJN Kiyoshimo and J2M4 Kai are temporarily available for Golden Eagles with a 50% discount! When: From July 1st

entries.title: A Decal Trophy and Discount on the J35A for 100 Years of the Swedish Air Force!
entries.description: On July 1st 1926, the Swedish Air Force was established as a separate military branch. Today it celebrates its centenary! The country maintained neutrality during both World War II and the Cold War while simultaneously building up its military capabilities. This was particularly true of the Air Force: aviation enthusiasts worldwide are well aware of the Draken, Viggen, Gripen, and other masterpieces of Swedish aircraft engineering. entries.title: 'Fewer than 10' employees remain at Thick as Thieves studio following another round of layoffs
entries.description: Thick as Thieves developer OtherSide Entertainment has laid off 18 employees, according to a Game Developer report, a move that comes just two weeks after the studio laid off 17 people following the cancellation of a new game it had in development. A studio rep told the site that following this round of cuts, "fewer than 10" people remain employed at OtherSide, working on updates for Thick as Thieves, and that there are "currently no plans for the studio to work on any future games.".. Read more

entries.title: Asymmetrical Battles Await You In the “Advance” Event!
entries.description: We’d like to invite you to participate in the “Advance” event! This is an asymmetrical battle where one team must capture all the points on the map, while the other defends them. Capturing key points decides the outcome of the battle, and familiar locations are revisited in a new tactical perspective. From July 3rd (11:00 GMT) until July 6th (11:00 GMT), look for “Advance” in the “Events and Tournaments” tab. How the event works The event takes place in Arcade and Realistic Battles on the Port N

entries.title: July 4th: Discounts, Rewards & Rare Vehicles for the US 250th Anniversary!
entries.description: July 4th marks the anniversary of the United States of America! The country’s independence was proclaimed by signing the world-famous Declaration of Independence in 1776. July 4th 2026 marks the 250th anniversary, and we join in on the congratulations with discounts and various rewards for playing in battles! 50% discount on US vehicles! When: From July 3rd (11:00 GMT) until July 10th (11:00 GMT). Where: USA > Aviation / Army > Premium vehicles. M26E1 (Rank IV) for 3740 Golden Eagles F-86F-35 (R

entries.title: Top scientists uncover way to make Kingdom Come: Deliverance more complicated—turn it into a board game
entries.description: Here's my problem with Kingdom Come: Deliverance —it's simply not finicky enough. It's too straightforward, I am too able to keep its rules and demands in my head, the game does not compel me to keep track of enough small things. Oh, you expect me to put my armour on in a precise order? That's complicated. For babies ... Read more.

entries.title: Celebrating our community
entries.description: Freedoms Greetings Helldivers, Our devs are hard at work on a Hot Fix for the game, more info to be shared on that next week. So we wanted to use today's blog to celebrate an amazing initiative from players within our community: “HEROES 2026”, The Freedom Alliance annual fundraiser with Save The Children. The Freedom Alliance is the largest independent community for Helldivers 2 boasting over 50,000 active members across Discord and their website ( https://www.freedomalliance.gg/ ). Freedom Alli

entries.title: Server maintenance in one hour - Update #2 to follow
entries.description: In preparation for the redeployment of Update #2, server maintenance will begin in around 45 minutes from the time of this post. This work should last 30-45 minutes, following which UPDATE #2 will be made live. Please make sure you exit the game and download the update once maintenance has concluded. entries.title: 40 New User-Created Camouflages in the Heavy Cavalry Trophy!
entries.description: A major update has arrived, bringing with it a namesake trophy containing camouflage coupons created by the WT Live community. Inside, you’ll find a wide range of new camouflages for vehicles featured in recent events and the Heavy Cavalry major update, making it a perfect opportunity to deck out your newly acquired machines! The trophy also offers a chance to obtain coupons for rare vehicles and a unique decal. Contents of the Heavy Cavalry trophy: Coupons for rare vehicles 19 camouflage coupon

entries.title: Update #2 Out Now!
entries.description: Hey everyone, First off, massive shout out to the over 300,000 of you that have joined us on Sophie since our launch last week and a huge thanks for all of the feedback and reports you've provided that continue to help us improve the game! Yesterday, we dropped an update that caused some issues for a pretty significant number of our players and were forced to roll back to the previous version while we addressed these issues. We've now completed this work and are re-deploying update #2 (with even

entries.title: Zgarniaj gwieździste premie na Dzień Niepodległości w GTA Online
entries.description: Uczcij rocznicę ogłoszenia niepodległości przez USA w GTA Online i obłów się na największej wyprzedaży w historii, zgarniając za darmo bunkier przy Lago Zancudo, dodatkowe nagrody za misje dozbrojeniowe i z bunkra, potrójne nagrody za wyścigi kaskaderskie, powracającego do oferty monster trucka Vapida Liberatora oraz motocykl Western Sovereign i wiele więcej. Zabezpiecz się na wypadek zagrożenia, odbierając bunkier przy Lago Zancudo dostępny do 13 lipca za darmo na stronie Maze Bank Foreclosures

entries.title: Football Festival Event in World of Tanks Blitz
entries.description: Victory in a football match goes to those who think strategically, stay one step ahead, fall back to defend at the right time, and choose the perfect moment to attack. And most importantly, it goes to those who have mastered the art of breakthrough — and know how to make every shot count. This should all sound familiar, because you play Blitz! Your team's mascot—Rico the honey badger—is already on the field. Don't keep him waiting: jump into the game, become the top scorer, and claim your reward

entries.title: Watch the Challenger League Major II and Earn Twitch Drops!
entries.description: The Challenger League Major II is here, and the competition is about to reach its most exciting stage! After battling through the qualifiers, the best teams have earned their place in this major and are ready to showcase their skills against some of the strongest rising talent in the scene. Every match matters as they fight for valuable league points, prestige, and a chance to establish themselves among the Challenger League's elite. The tournament will be played in the intense 4v4 Air format, w

entries.title: UK Rework Project: Inverness
entries.description: We hope you've packed a warm jacket and perhaps a wee bit of shortbread, because today we're taking you to the Scottish Highlands! We're excited to share with you a closer look at Inverness, a brand-new city arriving as part of our upcoming UK Rework project for Euro Truck Simulator 2 . Let's take a closer look at what this destination has to offer drivers. Known as the "Gateway to the Highlands", Inverness serves as an important hub for transport, tourism, and industry in the north of Scotland.

entries.title: PUBG EMEA CHAMPIONSHIP & PUBG AMERICAS SERIES RETURNS
entries.description: PEC: Fall and PAS2 returns to give teams from across EMEA and Americas the opportunity to prove themselves and compete for a chance to earn PGC Points to qualify for the PUBG Global Championship 2026 in Istanbul, Türkiye. With so much on the line, we hope you are as excited as we are for the tournament to kick off. Whether you are an established roster or an up-and-coming squad looking to make your mark, this is your chance to compete against the region's best and begin or continue your journey

entries.title: Reward Car Build July 3rd
entries.description: This handling build for the 2005 Mitsubishi #1 Sierra Sierra Enterprises Lancer Evolution Time Attack, created by R e Z o a K, excels at handling. Try it out using Share Code 974 062 451.

entries.title: Community Exhibit Vol. 26
entries.description: Welcome back, Officers. It’s summer in the northern hemisphere, so many of us at VOID are trying to stay cool. We hope you can do the same. While we’re hard at work on what’s next for Ready or Not, we’ve got another community exhibit for you to highlight what’s going on in, and around, the RoN community. ﻿ Stack Up Partnership We’re thrilled to announce that we’re working with a new charity partner, Stack Up. Stack Up supports US and Allied veterans by promoting positive mental health and combat

entries.title: EVE Online studio Fenris follows through on yearslong promise to make its in-house game engine fully open source
entries.description: On July 1, Fenris Creations (formerly CCP) completed the full open source release of its in-house Carbon Engine, the tech behind long-running MMO EVE Online and early access space survival game EVE Frontier. The Carbon Engine's repositories are available now on GitHub ... Read more.

entries.title: Cyberpunk 2077 has now sold more than 40 million copies, 'a testament to what CD Projekt does best'
entries.description: It's hard to imagine now, but Cyberpunk 2077 was an unmitigated disaster when it launched back in 2020. The PC version wasn't too bad, relatively speaking, but the console version was so wretched that Sony literally kicked it off the PlayStation Store . It was so far gone that several months after launch, with CD Projekt just beginning to start the work of cleaning up the mess it made, we recommended that it just fix the bugs and move on . Whoops ... Read more.

entries.title: OPEN GAME FEST 2026
entries.description: OPEN GAME FEST is an offline event held in Kyoto, designed to foster growth and boost motivation among game developers and students aiming to enter the industry. The event serves as a platform for both creators and the general public to discover brand-new games. This year, we are excited to introduce our very first online event page. Even if you cannot attend in person, you can still explore the exhibited titles in depth. We hope you enjoy the event!

entries.title: The Jackass Sticker Capsule
entries.description: Today we’re excited to release the Jackass Sticker Capsule in association with Paramount Games Studio, Jackass graphic artist Andy Jenkins, and community artist TheDanidem. Celebrating the release of jackass: best and last , the Jackass Sticker Capsule contains 39 stickers referencing iconic Jackass moments. Whether it’s an airhorn on a golf course or a trip down Electric Avenue, there’s something for every jackass in here; even you!

entries.title: Sand publisher celebrates 300,000 copies sold: 'We getting a half hour of air conditioning tonight!'
entries.description: X A couple weeks after its early access launch, things are going mostly pretty well for the steampunk-mechs-in-the-desert game Sand: Raiders of Sophie . An update that rolled out on July 2 caused some surprise headaches and had to be rolled back, which isn't great, but on the brighter side the game looks to be a legitimate hit, too... Read more.

entries.title: Mouthwashing's follow-up is self-described 'friendsweat' where 3 players struggle to operate a tank in a defiled city: 'We're definitely not quite at Peak, but we're not trying to make Arma either'
entries.description: head of Carcass Clad's reveal at last month's PC Gaming Show, I had the chance to speak to Wrong Organ devs Jeffrey Tomec and Dave van Egdom about the studio's follow-up to its breakout hit, Mouthwashing. Carcass Clad is a very different sort of game , but with familiar themes and atmosphere . The bulk of our conversation, though, was about why the studio pivoted to co-op multiplayer, and how it feels to play... Read more.

entries.title: ARK Tides of Fortune, Dragontopia and Genesis Part 1 are out now!
entries.description: Pull up a chair, Survivors. Everyone knows the legendary ARK veteran Bob, played by Karl Urban, but you haven't truly heard a tale until you've survived his swashbuckling exploits on the high seas. Hoist the sails and experience his next chapter of incredibly true adventures in ARK Tides of Fortune! The simulated ocean of Genesis Ascended Part 1 has opened into a massive, map-wide nautical frontier. Chart a course across a vast sea, hunt for buried treasure, and clash with treacherous enemies in

entries.title: We're attending Bilibili World 2026 in Shanghai!
entries.description: We're attending Bilibili World 2026 in Shanghai! Between July 10 – July 12, 2026 two of our finest, Sir Tobi and Martin Klima will be heading to China to attend this years Bilibili World. There's a bunch of stuff happening, from fan gatherings, discussion panels and meet and greet oppertunities. If you're part of our Chinese community, we'd love to see you! Details of the fan gathering here (In Chinese langauge) The Kingdom Come: Deliverance franchise is on Sale now! Kingdom Come: Deliverance II

entries.title: Modders made a Fallout 4 quest in a weekend for charity, and it features iconic Elder Scrolls actor Wes Johnson
entries.description: new Fallout 4 mod, Double Feature, is the fourth collaboration by modders Kinggath and co. with Elder Scrolls icon Wes Johnson—the man behind characters like Molag Bal, Sheogorath, and a whole lot more —as well as Fallout actors Jan Johns and Leer Leary. It's part of Kinggath's annual modding for charity project, which led to the creation of similar mods like Shady Motives and Trunk's Malfunction ... Read more.

entries.title: Counter-Strike 2 might be the biggest game on Steam, but Global Offensive is breaking player count records since it went standalone again
entries.description: nytime you're talking about the hottest game on Steam, there's an evergreen unspoken caveat: 'after Counter-Strike, of course.' CS2 is unquestionably Steam's killer app—it has well over a million concurrent players as I write this according to SteamDB, and it's showing no signs of slowing down. But don't count out the game it once absorbed and then spat out : its predecessor, Global Offensive... Read more.

entries.title: Researchers studying ChatGPT conversations surprised to find one power user churning out thousands of Doki Doki Literature Club pregnancy fics
entries.description: s spotted by Japan's IT Media News , a paper presented at Purdue University's MFS Cultural AI Conference called AI Fiction in the Wild performed a fascinating study of half a million anonymous English-language ChatGPT-user conversations using WildChat, and found some real oddities. Well, one in particular... Read more.

entries.title: Coaches: MAN Lion's Coach Gameplay Preview
entries.description: Today, we’re excited to share your very first look at gameplay from our upcoming Coaches DLC for Euro Truck Simulator 2, a highly anticipated expansion that many of you in our community have been eager to see more of. Let's hit the road! In this first showcase, we go behind the wheel of the MAN Lion's Coach . Join us as we take on a bus route between Duisburg and Rotterdam. Along the way, you’ll get a glimpse at the passenger satisfaction mechanics in its current iteration, and how it will play

entries.title: Hasbro should stop looking for a Baldur's Gate 4 studio and take a leaf out of Larian's book by trying something new
entries.description: Larian didn't want to make Baldur's Gate 4 , BioWare veteran James Ohlen didn't want to make Baldur's Gate 4, so who's going to make it? I'm not going to answer that question, not just because I don't have a clue , but because I'm starting to think that nobody should make it... Read more.

entries.title: Marvel Rivals players suspect Captain America's summer sausage has already been downsized
entries.description: Last week, Marvel Rivals made the headlines for a familiar reason: one of its new skins is on the bleeding edge of horny superhero costume design. But in a refreshing change of pace, it was the boys' turn this time around—Captain America got a summer swimsuit skin with proportions so absurd they'd make a Gears of War character blush and an egregiously huge bulge for his… Washington Monument... Read more.

entries.title: One of our favorite Half-Life 2 mods is getting a stealth game prequel where you're a Combine assassin preying on the human resistance
entries.description: The cult classic Half-Life 2 mod series Entropy: Zero has another entry in the works, and speaking as a fan of Thief, Deus Ex, and all things immersive sim, Entropy: Zero 2 - Progenitors may be the most exciting one yet... Read more.

entries.title: Danganronpa 2x2 remaster will include a 'slayhem' alternate story mode with '20% more content' and a 3D world map, but it's been delayed to 2027
entries.description: Last year Spike Chunsoft announced a remaster of divisive visual novel sequel Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair to be called Danganronpa 2x2. Intriguingly, said remaster will also include an alternate storyline, so if you don't want to suffer through the original story again you can experience a different version of events playing out on its murder island deathtrap... Read more.

entries.title: Watch Night of the Living Dead and other public domain horror movies inside this creepy dollfest
entries.description: Isla de las Muñecas, the Mexican island that holds the Guinness World Record for largest collection of haunted dolls, served as the inspiration for Where Dolls Hang, a survival horror game where you play a detective searching for people who've gone missing in a particularly cursed location... Read more.

entries.title: Elder Scrolls Online developer left reeling by Xbox layoffs—with teams gutted, senior talent gone, and roadmaps 'shifting' as a result
entries.description: The axe has finally fallen from Xbox's latest round of layoffs and studio sloughing— characterised as a "reset" by its current CEO , Asha Sharma, who paradoxically wants the company to have 1 billion daily players somehow . ZeniMax Online Studios, which currently develops Elder Scrolls Online, has reportedly been hit quite hard... Read more.

entries.title: Scheduled Maintenance on July 7th
entries.description: On July 7th starting from 07:00 GMT, the game servers may be temporarily unavailable due to the release of update 2.57.1.6. The new version is incompatible with the previous one, so you will need to update your client to log in. We apologize for any inconvenience and thank you for your understanding!

entries.title: Echoes of Aincrad: Everything You Need to Know
entries.description: Let us fill you in on the first game to ever simulate the experience of joining SAO as your own unique player character. Become your own survivor in Aincrad Echoes of Aincrad puts you in the shoes of an early beta player for the original Sword Art Online VRMMORPG. Like Kirito, you'll be among the first to experience quests, discover mechanics, and uncover valuable knowledge before the official launch. What you learn during the beta may become the key to your survival once the game's true purpose

Please find the patch notes below. 4.4.5 ‘Pegasus’ Patch Release Notes​ Feature ​ Added a Resource Abundance slider in galaxy settings. This slider ranges from “Scarce” to x5 in 0.25 increments, where x1 is approximately the resource abundance of v4.3 and x5 is essentially 4.4’s “resources everywhere”. The default is x2. We do recognize that this is a little confusing, but it give

entries.title: HOI IV Dev Corner | Questions about Civil Wars
entries.description: Hello all! First of all I want to be extra clear - we are not talking about a rework for civil wars . What I am after is understanding how you’ve enjoyed content with civil wars , what feels good, what doesn’t feel good. So! When you start a game with a country that has a civil war , and you intend to play as that new nation, whether that be fascist UK, Communist Japan - what do you as a player do before the civil war starts? Some questions that may help you along the way: How do you feel when y

entries.title: Faith, Power, and the Medieval Church - A Crusader Kings III Documentary
entries.description: In the latest episode of our ongoing documentary series, medieval historian Eleanor Janega explores the real history at the heart of our upcoming Core Expansion for Crusader Kings III: By God Alone . Filmed inside one of London’s oldest medieval churches, this video enters a world where the Church did more than shape belief: it helped decide who held power, who could be challenged, and what counted as a rightful claim. For medieval rulers in Christendom, faith and politics were two sides of the

We've updated the [c]stellaris_test_4.5[/c] branch with the following changes: 4.5 ‘Cygnus’ Open Beta 2 Release Notes The 4.5 Open Beta now also includes all changes from 4.4.5. entries.title: This action RPG's more-with-more-on-top excess is as fun as expansion design gets
entries.description: Special effects go off like fireworks, my screen a constant blur of colour. Gushes of golden numbers—some of them in the millions—accompany every sword swing and magical burst. AoE patterns light up the floor, warning me about the maelstrom I'll soon have to dodge my way through. And while all of this is going on my party's endlessly chatting away to each other, remarking on every activated skill and buff... Read more.

entries.title: My first 40 days in Moonlight Peaks started off with juicy feuds, but its anemic character writing is starting to show through
entries.description: new farm sim has launched today and, as is tradition, cozy game enjoyers gather round to ask each other: Is Moonlight Peaks worth it? I'm about 40 days (nights, actually) into my playthrough, so it'll be just a bit longer before I can deliver our scored review, but I want to give some early impressions to help all my fellow farm simmers figure out if this month's flavor is one to take a bite out of... Read more.

entries.title: Revelations Update 4 Release Notes
entries.description: DOOM: The Dark Ages | Revelations HELL FREEZES OVER in DOOM: The Dark Ages | Revelations, an all-new campaign expansion that unleashes a brutal new chapter of the Slayer’s saga. Wounded and betrayed, the Slayer is thrust into a merciless purgatory only escapable by confronting haunting truths and forging new strength with the help of a mysterious ally. He must ascend from the prison of his mind and fight an abomination of the gods to set his followers on the path to freedom. Featuring new levels

entries.title: You still can't kill fish in Subnautica 2, but starting tomorrow you'll at least be able to 'stun' them
entries.description: Everyone likes Subnautica 2. We sure do: after all that drama, it turns out the early access survival sequel is quite good, actually . Players also dig it: it's got smashing reviews on Steam and it sold a million copies in its first hour on its way to more than four million in its first week... Read more.

entries.title: How to go on dates in Moonlight Peaks and start your road to romance
entries.description: I was pleasantly surprised to find that going on dates in Moonlight Peaks is more involved than your average farm sim. After you extend an invite, your beau will take you out for a little activity featuring some of Moonlight Peaks' minigames. You're free to date around, too, so don't be stingy with your time. Here's how to start stepping out with all the locals... Read more.

entries.title: How to find all Elvira's clues in her Moonlight Peaks treasure hunt
entries.description: When Elvira cooks up a little treasure hunt for you in Moonlight Peaks, you may find yourself stumped if you haven't explored too far out of town. A couple of her poetic little hints refer to locations you've got to really pay attention to. Down below I'll go into detail on the clues and where to find them, but here's a quick reference list of all five clue locations:.. Read more.

entries.title: Former Elder Scrolls Online designer laments the destruction of layoffs: 'There’s really no one left and no changing it now'
entries.description: Yesterday's layoffs at Xbox took, and will continue to take, a terrible toll. Some trumpeted the fact that no studios were closed, although the practical impact of spinning them out to independence or new ownership remains to be seen, but that has no bearing on the blow to morale caused by such deep cuts to long-standing dev teams... Read more.

entries.title: Palworld Surpasses 40 Million Players!
entries.description: 40 million players have now played Palworld! Over the last 2.5 years, Palworld has grown alongside our community. Thank you all so much for your incredible support! Today, Bucky is taking a look back on all the updates the game has had so far! We hope you're all excited as we are for Palworld 1.0, launching July 10! ▼ Palworld passes 40 million players! │ Palworld Official https://store.steampowered.com/app/1623730/Palworld/

entries.description: We keep fighting cheaters using your reports and the anti-cheat systems, and as usual, today we’re sharing a bit of info on bans that we’ve distributed over the past month. If you’d like to help keep War Thunder free from cheating, you can find out how to file a report and how our anti-cheat system works on our Wiki . Banned accounts Since our last fair play update, we have banned 2,165 accounts that were found to have violated the rules, specifically paragraph 3.2.3 of the EULA, namely the auto

entries.title: Season 9: The Mystery of Thebes // Dev Vision Vol. 19
entries.description: Guangguang and Zhiyong are back again to kick off Season 9 by diving into the Mystery of Thebes! 🌟 Get ready for fresh new changes, our latest hero that'll shake up the battlefield, and a brand-new map. 📅 Season 9 begins on July 10th UTC. Get ready to jump into the biggest update of Marvel Rivals yet!

entries.title: Outstanding Inspectors Announcement Episode 2
entries.description: Arena Breakout: Infinite S5 Inspector Summary: 8623 players actively participated in the Inspector work, a total of 583283 cases were reported and investigated, and 1289 players who cheated were banned. We'd like to take this moment to express the utmost gratitude to our entire Inspector Community. Throughout the season, many outstanding Inspectors stood out through their steadfast belief in justice. With exceptional discernment and unwavering perseverance, they quickly became outstanding Inspec

entries.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced review
entries.description: ssassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced might go down as one of the more puzzling remakes ever conceived. Not only is it bizarre that Ubisoft decided to kick off a likely streak of remakes with the sixth game of the series, but it also chose a game so recently and universally enjoyed that the only way to "remake" it is to simply put out the same game again... Read more.

entries.title: The Drop ft. Dimitri Vegas returns for another encore.
entries.description: Celebrity Elusive Target The Drop feat. DJ Dimitri Vegas is back! Put an end to his deadly antics and bring the good vibes back to the dance floor. Available until July 26th . https://store.steampowered.com/app/3110360/HITMAN_WOA__The_Drop_Pack/ https://store.steampowered.com/app/1659040/HITMAN_World_of_Assassination/

entries.title: Here's the Black Flag Resynced release time for your region
entries.description: Black Flag Resynced , the much-anticipated remake of the classic pirate-themed Assassin's Creed installment, is set to release shortly, letting us revisit Edward Kenway, kill a million British soldiers, and sink a navy's worth of ships. It's all in the name of plunder, though... Read more.

entries.title: Triumphant return
entries.description: Triumphs are now live in the game! Complete tasks, take part in the Faction Race, earn coins, and claim your rewards. 🪙 And of course, don’t forget to redeem the promo code to get extra Pops' coins and years of service rewards: STALZONE2026 The promo code is valid until September 2 . 💬 Share in the comments how many Triumphs you managed to complete over the past year!
